verse.verse_4: Ta‘rujul-malā'ikatu war-rūḥu ilaihi fī yaumin kāna miqdāruhū khamsīna alfa sanah(tin).
verse.verse_11: Yubaṣṣarūnahum, yawaddul-mujrimu lau yaftadī  min ‘ażābi yaumi'iżim bibanīh(i).
verse.verse_14: Wa man fil-arḍi jamī‘ā(n), ṡumma yunjīh(i).
verse.verse_30: Illā ‘alā azwājihim au mā malakat aimānuhum fa innahum gairu malūmīn(a).
verse.verse_31: Fa manibtagā warā'a żālika fa ulā'ika  humul-‘ādūn(a).
verse.verse_38: Ayaṭma‘u kullumri'im minhum ay yudkhala jannata na‘īm(in).
verse.verse_40: Falā uqsimu birabbil-masyāriqi wal-magāribi  innā laqādirūn(a).
verse.verse_41: ‘Alā an nubaddila khairam minhum, wa mā naḥnu bimasbūqīn(a).
verse.verse_42: Fa żarhum yakhūḍū  wa yal‘abū ḥattā yulāqū yaumahumul-lażī yū‘adūn(a)
verse.verse_43: Yauma yakhrujūna minal-ajdāṡi sirā‘an ka'annahum ilā nuṣubiy yūfiḍūn(a).
verse.verse_44: Khāsyi‘atan abṣāruhum tarhaquhum żillah(tun), żālikal-yaumul-lażī kānū yū‘adūn(a).
